prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `695367ec`.
codex_response:
Implemented `695367ec` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: take the input’s single color and draw a 15×15 black lattice with full horizontal separators every `height(input)` rows and full vertical separators every `width(input)` columns. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` or new primitive was needed.

Task package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_695367ec/__init__.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_695367ec/generator.py#L1), and [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_695367ec/verifier.py#L1). The generator keeps the same task family by using single-color filled rectangles and the same lattice construction, with moderate aspect ratios so the previews stay closer to the official square-heavy examples while still supporting 1000 unique inputs.

Validation passed:
- `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 695367ec`: 4/4 official examples
- `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 695367ec --n-examples 1000`: built artifacts
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 695367ec`: 1000/1000 generated examples

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/695367ec/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/695367ec/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/695367ec/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/695367ec/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/695367ec/previews/preview_03.png).
